voice.tone: competitive, playful, health-coded — fitness meets gaming
voice.personality: speaks to people who want health accountability wrapped in competition
do: Frame steps as points, wins, and league standings
Make fitness feel like a sport you can actually win
$10/month — frame the value as cheap for what competition gives you
sample_phrases: Every step is a point. Every point is a win.
The league doesn't care how you feel. It cares how far you walked.

aida.attention_hook: a competitive fitness truth — most people walk alone, StepLeague makes it a sport
aida.interest: what the league structure looks like — rankings, competitions, monthly cycles
aida.desire: the feeling of winning a fitness competition and holding the top spot
